programmes.show_description: Tune in for the launch of Hunkydory's renowned 12" x 12" Adorable Scoreboard, now in a sleek Classic Cream Edition - plus the brand-new Adorable Scoreboard Handbook 9.
It's our 4th birthday, and Studio Light is joining the party! Grab 4-for-3 offers, £40 bundles, and 40% off selected favourites - but hurry, these birthday deals won't last long.
Bring springtime joy to your makes with the Foiled Spring Elegance Papercraft Collection. A beautiful 44-sheet collection, ready to inspire your creations for the season ahead.
It's our 4th birthday, and Studio Light is joining the party! Grab 4-for-3 offers, £40 bundles, and 40% off selected favourites - but hurry, these birthday deals won't last long.
Send lovely birthday wishes and greetings to friends, family and other loved ones with the new Big Book of Birthday Sentiments. A must-have in your crafting stash!

Bulk Buy Deals are special offers where you save money when purchasing larger quantities of products at once - perfect for stocking up!
Tash Hutchins is back with her sell-out Diana Dress & Top pattern. A perfect make for Spring!
Discover beautiful fabrics perfect for creating garments that fit, flatter, and feel wonderful to wear, from flowing prints to structured classics for every style and season.
Tash Hutchins is back demonstrating her exclusive Sewing Street Hampton Dress Pattern.
Fall in love with beautifully curated quilt kits, packed with coordinating fabrics and clear instructions to help you create stunning quilts with confidence and joy.
Keith is back to celebrate our 4th birthday with his signature mix of quality, quantity, and fun! Enjoy all day P&P for just £4.95 and fill your basket with birthday treats galore!
Join Phill Martin for a masterclass featuring his Beautifully Beaded & Double Pierced Duo! Learn expert techniques and create intricate designs that will elevate your crafting.
Jess brings a selection of premier quilling kits, blending modern flair with sophistication and inviting everyone to explore the beauty of this timeless art form.
Meet the xTool F2, a next-generation laser cutter and engraver built for accuracy, efficiency and ease of use. Portable yet powerful!

...Deals Books: It's World Book Day and we're celebrating with unmissable deals on books!
Suzie Duncan launches a brand new pattern to complement the latest Liberty Palace Gardens fabric collection - The Patricia Bag.
Discover bold, vibrant designs from renowned textile artist Dan Morris - perfect for eye-catching quilts, statement projects, bags and home décor.
Suzie Duncan demonstrates the Liberty Palace Gardens Quilt Kit designed by Nicola Dodd.
Achieve professional finishes with versatile overlock machines, perfect for sewing, trimming, and finishing seams quickly and neatly on all your dressmaking and quilting projects.
Everyone loves a snuggly sweatshirt so why not recreate a loved ones favourite for an eye-catching card? Tune in for the launch of Moonstone Dies - Snuggly Sweatshirt.
Renowned for adding character, life, and charm to every project, Carnation Crafts' hand-drawn artwork shines in the new Fleeting Beauty collection - explore the delicate designs.
Send extra-special cards with the new Luxury Shaped Cards - Easy Easels! Each card blank is cut from amazing Ink Me! Cardstock and comes pre-scored for easy use.
The party's on! The wonderful series of the House-Mouse Designs continues with playful themes - House Mouse Party Parade is here with whimsical mice, and party-perfect designs.
Hunkydory's renowned 12" x 12" Adorable Scoreboard, is now available in a sleek Classic Cream Edition - plus the brand-new Adorable Scoreboard Handbook 9.
Renowned for adding character, life, and charm to every project, Carnation Crafts' hand-drawn artwork shines in the new Fleeting Beauty collection - explore the delicate designs.
As the saying goes "You're not aging, you're leveling up!" So why not embrace the celebration with the Aged to Perfection Collection? A unique and fun birthday offering.
Join us for an hour of Nice Crafting as part of our birthday celebrations! Enjoy live craft demonstrations, exclusive deals, and get inspired to start your next papercraft project.
